summary: A comprehensive, OSDI/SOSP/MLSys-grade evaluation plan for AAEC, structured into 6 evaluation dimensions: End-to-End Serving Benchmarks, Component Micro-Benchmarks, Ablation Studies, Scalability Studies, Accuracy Verification, and Sensitivity Analysis. Includes specific baselines (PowerInfer-2, ProMoE, AdapMoE, HOBBIT, DALI, Fate, MoE-Infinity, vLLM), hardware configurations, workloads, and the exact metrics and tables to produce.
